TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Fuo-la-di-mi-e. Lei-ngiÂºóÊãâËø™Á±≥Áàæ¬∑ÂàóÂØß == yikaudip yu mahidaÊó©ÊúüÁîüÊ¥ª wawa henayÂπ¥Â∞ëÊôÇÊúü Yi-li-ya.W-li-yen-nuo-fu atu ci Ma-li-ya.W-li-yeng-nuo-wa mikikun, lalabuay nu luma' a tademaw ci An-na. Yei-li-ca-nuo-wa, Ya-li-san-ta. W-li-yeng, Nuo-fu, Lea-nin, Aw-li-cia. W-li-yeng-nuo-wa, De-mi-te'-li. W-li-yeng-nuo-fu atu ci Ma-li-ya. W-li-yeng-nuo-wa. . Lea-nin a wama ci Yi-li-ya.W-li-yen-nuo-fu pilecuhan i E'-luo-se kalung nu malukay a lumaan, nai' ku wantan tu binacadan nida, hakiya idaw ku E'-luo-se tademaw, Cu-wa-se tademaw, Muo-e-duo-wa tademaw atu Ka-mai-ke' tademaw a nikalamel nu idangan, amica ku sasabay kawawan, itida ci nida i Ke'-san tabakiay a cacudadan minanam tu Wu-li atu Su-sye, sa taydan i Pen-sa siidaay nu cacudadan malasaydan, sisa tapabaw ku nikaudip. teban nu caywal nemlu mihcaan, Yi-li-ya atu ci Ma-li-ya. W-li-yeng-nuo-wa mikikung. 75 100 wama ni Ma-li-ya u kilisetu nu sinziaan a E'-luo-se-yu-tay-zen misaydan, wina u De-kuo atu Zui-dan nika lamella, u siidaay nu lumaan, nu micudaday ci nida. caay ka tenes namikikun, ci Yi-li-ya mala Sia-nuo-fu-ke-luo-de nu wawaan a cacudadan malacuzen, itida i Sin-pi-e-se mikuli makaala tu enemay a mihcan, tu sakalima a mihcaan, cinida sisa sihu aydaay nu pikiyakuan macaka malasen ci nu Kuo-li cacudadan nu dusye, pasikiningan tu sepat a lasubu lima a bataan nu kakuwanan a cicin. sakay pikiwyikuan idaw ku nipaayaw, sisa idaw ku kawlah nida tu Sen-fuo-la-di-mi-e nu payaan, pabelian tu sapidayday nu E-luo-se nu siidaay a tademaw. . Lea-nin a babalaki u cun-cu-cu-yi atu pakunida sananay a tademawan, pacukeday ci Sa-hun-ya-li-san-ta ese nipatahkalan a caywal nemcay mihcaan misumad tu kalung nu malukay. miliyas ku nuheni tu cen-ce a makatalay a tademaw, inai' ku siwmi ya kincal naw ku mikilim tu sapakasicumi tu nidatengan ni Lei-ngi mikantuk tu lumaan. mihcaan tu lalud, hamin nu luma' taydan i Lei-ni-nie-ke-ku'-e-ci-nuo midang, u calekakaan nida, ci Lei-ngi atu sabana nida ci Aw-li-cia masasungaay ku nu heni, icilang ku balucu, maaday aca, hina hang sa tu la'cusay nida a waywayan. manamuh miladlad tu udip, hatidaay tu nu demiadan manamuh i putah atu misalama tu tizibang. . caywal walnem mihcaan cacay a bulad, ci ama ni Lei-ngi siidang ku tangah sikapatay, tawya ci Lei-ngi mihcaan nida sabaw nem. kilul sa mahicaay tu kiya ku wayway ni Lei-ngi hina paculi tu, sisa amelik satu ci nida miales tu papatatengaan nida tu sinkuan. nanutawya, hida satu micudad tu Sen-pi-de-paw tabakiay a cacudadan tu Seng-wu-sye-si a kakaan nu Ya-li-san-ta, mibabelih tu Sa-hung-ya-li-san-ta sanse micidekay a cen-ce, malingatu taydan nu mikinkiw a kauyli nu misulitay a tademaw, atu masakaputay mibabelihay tu sihuan. caywal walpic mihcaan lima a bulad tusep dimiad, kaka ni Lei-ngi ci Ya-li-san-ta melacen mipatay. amica ku nikapatayan atu kaka u sakaadadaan nu balucuan, nika ci Lei-ngi pacicitu minanam, maala nida ku kawlah kapah ku nipihedek micuda. 118 420 mahida u kaka ci Ya-li-san-ta, ci Lei-ngi maala ni Ka-e.Ma-ke-se atu Fuo-zuy-de-li-si.N-ke-se a cudadan. caywal walpic walu a bulad, malingatu micudad tu Ke'-san tabakiay a cacudadan, ci Lei-ngi malimad taydan nida i tepal nu cacudadan. picudadan, milabu ci nida tu picidekan nu masakaputay a niyaduan, maala mala tabakiay nu cacudadan tu niyadu'ay a dayhuw. katukuh tu sabw tusa a bulad, maydah tu ku sihu tu masakaputay nu micudaday a mikuwan, mibabelih ci Lei-ngi, palekal tu sapipaculiyay nu kawawan. dakepen nu kingcal ci Lei-ngi, saan palekalay tina kawawan isu ki tapanga han. kilul sa paalesan nu cacudadan, nikudan patayda nu E'-luo-se-ti'-kuo ci Lei-ngi i nalumaan nu heni a Ke-ku'e-ci-nuo. itida ci nida mabilil micudad, manamuh miadih tu nisulitan ni Ni-ku-la.Ce-e-ni-sye-hu-se-ci a cudadan "hica han tu" . 124 mabiyalw cina ni Lei-ngi tu wayway nida, sakamuen nida ku E'-luo-se-ti'-kuo sakakaay papatalumaen ci Lei-ngi i Ke-sa, miyukiw tu sapicudad nu tabakiay a cacudadan mapabelineng. taluma' satu i Ke'-san, milabu ci Lei-ngi tu Ni-ku-la.Fai-du-sye-ye-hu tu nikasasakamuen, sisa sayaway nida misukapah ci Ka-e.Ma-ke'-se tu caywal nempic mihcaan ni sulitan a cudadan "ce-pen-lun". "Ë≥áÊú¨Ë´ñ". ci Lei-ngi malingatu micuda tu E'-luo-se ma-ke-cu-yi nisulitan ni Ke-aw-e-ci.Pu-lei-han-nuo-hu. palutatengan tu nisulitan ni Pu-lei-han-nuo-hu, nikudan palekal tu E'-luo-se fun-cin-ce-tu' milimad pasayda i ce-pen-cu-yu katukuh tu se-hun-cu-yi, ainai' ku zaysang atu macian nu mikuliay nu tademawan kiy taneng maadih, nika caay piida tu malukay. ci Lei-ngi amica ku nipikai tu sakalecad nu se-hun-cu-yi a nakamuan, nika malalid ni Pi-de.Te'-ka-ye-hu, Cia-e-kay, Ne-cea-ye-hu tu sakalecan nu kawawan. atu masasungaay atu mincua a tademaw.
S.PHON: == fuo-r~…æa-di-mi-…ô. r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi******** == jikaudip ju maƒßida**** wawa ƒß…ônaj**** ji-r~…æi-ja.w-r~…æi-j…ôn-nuo-fu atu ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja.w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa mikikun, r~…æar~…æabuaj nu r~…æuma î~ ° a tad…ômaw ¶i an-na. j…ôi-r~…æi- ¶a-nuo-wa, ja-r~…æi-san-ta. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã, nuo-fu, r~…æ…ôa-nin, aw-r~…æi- ¶ia. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa, d…ô-mi-t…ô î~ °-r~…æi. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-fu atu ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa. . r~…æ…ôa-nin a wama ¶i ji-r~…æi-ja.w-r~…æi-j…ôn-nuo-fu pir~…æ…ô ¶uƒßan i …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô kar~…æu≈ã nu mar~…æukaj a r~…æumaan, nai î~ ° ku wantan tu bina ¶adan nida, ƒßakija idaw ku …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô tad…ômaw, ¶u-wa-s…ô tad…ômaw, muo-…ô-duo-wa tad…ômaw atu ka-mai-k…ô î~ ° tad…ômaw a nikar~…æam…ôr~…æ nu ida≈ãan, ami ¶a ku sasabaj kawawan, itida ¶i nida i k…ô î~ °-san tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu wu-r~…æi atu su-sj…ô, sa tajdan i p…ôn-sa siidaaj nu ¶a ¶udadan mar~…æasajdan, sisa tapabaw ku nikaudip. t…ôban nu ¶ajwar~…æ n…ômr~…æu miƒß ¶aan, ji-r~…æi-ja atu ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa mikiku≈ã. ** *** wama ni ma-r~…æi-ja u kir~…æis…ôtu nu sinziaan a …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô-ju-taj-z…ôn misajdan, wina u d…ô-kuo atu zui-dan nika r~…æam…ôr~…ær~…æa, u siidaaj nu r~…æumaan, nu mi ¶udadaj ¶i nida. ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs namikikun, ¶i ji-r~…æi-ja mar~…æa sia-nuo-fu-k…ô-r~…æuo-d…ô nu wawaan a ¶a ¶udadan mar~…æa ¶uz…ôn, itida i sin-pi-…ô-s…ô mikur~…æi makaar~…æa tu …ôn…ômaj a miƒß ¶an, tu sakar~…æima a miƒß ¶aan, ¶inida sisa siƒßu ajdaaj nu pikijakuan ma ¶aka mar~…æas…ôn ¶i nu kuo-r~…æi ¶a ¶udadan nu dusj…ô, pasikini≈ãan tu s…ôpat a r~…æasubu r~…æima a bataan nu kakuwanan a ¶i ¶in. sakaj pikiwjikuan idaw ku nipaajaw, sisa idaw ku kawr~…æaƒß nida tu s…ôn-fuo-r~…æa-di-mi-…ô nu pajaan, pab…ôr~…æian tu sapidajdaj nu …ô-r~…æuo-s…ô nu siidaaj a tad…ômaw. . r~…æ…ôa-nin a babar~…æaki u ¶un- ¶u- ¶u-ji atu pakunida sananaj a tad…ômawan, pa ¶uk…ôdaj ¶i sa-ƒßun-ja-r~…æi-san-ta …ôs…ô nipataƒßkar~…æan a ¶ajwar~…æ n…ôm ¶aj miƒß ¶aan misumad tu kar~…æu≈ã nu mar~…æukaj. mir~…æijas ku nuƒß…ôni tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a makatar~…æaj a tad…ômaw, inai î~ ° ku siwmi ja kin ¶ar~…æ naw ku mikir~…æim tu sapakasi ¶umi tu nidat…ô≈ãan ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi mikantuk tu r~…æumaan. miƒß ¶aan tu r~…æar~…æud, ƒßamin nu r~…æuma î~ ° tajdan i r~…æ…ôi-ni-ni…ô-k…ô-ku î~ °-…ô- ¶i-nuo mida≈ã, u ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaan nida, ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi atu sabana nida ¶i aw-r~…æi- ¶ia masasu≈ãaaj ku nu ƒß…ôni, i ¶ir~…æa≈ã ku bar~…æu ¶u, maadaj a ¶a, ƒßina ƒßa≈ã sa tu r~…æa î~ ° ¶usaj nida a wajwajan. manamuƒß mir~…æadr~…æad tu udip, ƒßatidaaj tu nu d…ômiadan manamuƒß i putaƒß atu misar~…æama tu tiziba≈ã. . ¶ajwar~…æ war~…æn…ôm miƒß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…æad, ¶i ama ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi siida≈ã ku ta≈ãaƒß sikapataj, tawja ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi miƒß ¶aan nida sabaw n…ôm. kir~…æur~…æ sa maƒßi ¶aaj tu kija ku wajwaj ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi ƒßina pa ¶ur~…æi tu, sisa am…ôr~…æik satu ¶i nida miar~…æ…ôs tu papatat…ô≈ãaan nida tu sinkuan. nanutawja, ƒßida satu mi ¶udad tu s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan tu s…ô≈ã-wu-sj…ô-si a kakaan nu ja-r~…æi-san-ta, mibab…ôr~…æiƒß tu sa-ƒßu≈ã-ja-r~…æi-san-ta sans…ô mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, mar~…æi≈ãatu tajdan nu mikinkiw a kaujr~…æi nu misur~…æitaj a tad…ômaw, atu masakaputaj mibab…ôr~…æiƒßaj tu siƒßuan. ¶ajwar~…æ war~…æpi ¶ miƒß ¶aan r~…æima a bur~…æad tus…ôp dimiad, kaka ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi ¶i ja-r~…æi-san-ta m…ôr~…æa ¶…ôn mipataj. ami ¶a ku nikapatajan atu kaka u sakaadadaan nu bar~…æu ¶uan, nika ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi pa ¶i ¶itu minanam, maar~…æa nida ku kawr~…æaƒß kapaƒß ku nipiƒß…ôd…ôk mi ¶uda. *** *** maƒßida u kaka ¶i ja-r~…æi-san-ta, ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi maar~…æa ni ka-…ô.ma-k…ô-s…ô atu fuo-zuj-d…ô-r~…æi-si.n-k…ô-s…ô a ¶udadan. ¶ajwar~…æ war~…æpi ¶ war~…æu a bur~…æad, mar~…æi≈ãatu mi ¶udad tu k…ô î~ °-san tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan, ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi mar~…æimad tajdan nida i t…ôpar~…æ nu ¶a ¶udadan. pi ¶udadan, mir~…æabu ¶i nida tu pi ¶id…ôkan nu masakaputaj a nijaduan, maar~…æa mar~…æa tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan tu nijadu î~ °aj a dajƒßuw. katukuƒß tu sabw tusa a bur~…æad, majdaƒß tu ku siƒßu tu masakaputaj nu mi ¶udadaj a mikuwan, mibab…ôr~…æiƒß ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi, par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu sapipa ¶ur~…æijaj nu kawawan. dak…ôp…ôn nu ki≈ã ¶ar~…æ ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi, saan par~…æ…ôkar~…æaj tina kawawan isu ki tapa≈ãa ƒßan. kir~…æur~…æ sa paar~…æ…ôsan nu ¶a ¶udadan, nikudan patajda nu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô-ti î~ °-kuo ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi i nar~…æumaan nu ƒß…ôni a k…ô-ku î~ °…ô- ¶i-nuo. itida ¶i nida mabir~…æir~…æ mi ¶udad, manamuƒß miadiƒß tu nisur~…æitan ni ni-ku-r~…æa. ¶…ô-…ô-ni-sj…ô-ƒßu-s…ô- ¶i a ¶udadan "ƒßi ¶a ƒßan tu" . *** mabijar~…æw ¶ina ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi tu wajwaj nida, sakamu…ôn nida ku …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô-ti î~ °-kuo sakakaaj papatar~…æuma…ôn ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi i k…ô-sa, mijukiw tu sapi ¶udad nu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan mapab…ôr~…æin…ô≈ã. tar~…æuma î~ ° satu i k…ô î~ °-san, mir~…æabu ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi tu ni-ku-r~…æa.fai-du-sj…ô-j…ô-ƒßu tu nikasasakamu…ôn, sisa sajawaj nida misukapaƒß ¶i ka-…ô.ma-k…ô î~ °-s…ô tu ¶ajwar~…æ n…ômpi ¶ miƒß ¶aan ni sur~…æitan a ¶udadan " ¶…ô-p…ôn-r~…æun". "***". ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi mar~…æi≈ãatu mi ¶uda tu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô ma-k…ô- ¶u-ji nisur~…æitan ni k…ô-aw-…ô- ¶i.pu-r~…æ…ôi-ƒßan-nuo-ƒßu. par~…æutat…ô≈ãan tu nisur~…æitan ni pu-r~…æ…ôi-ƒßan-nuo-ƒßu, nikudan par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô fun- ¶in- ¶…ô-tu î~ ° mir~…æimad pasajda i ¶…ô-p…ôn- ¶u-ju katukuƒß tu s…ô-ƒßun- ¶u-ji, ainai î~ ° ku zajsa≈ã atu ma ¶ian nu mikur~…æiaj nu tad…ômawan kij tan…ô≈ã maadiƒß, nika ¶aaj piida tu mar~…æukaj. ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi ami ¶a ku nipikai tu sakar~…æ…ô ¶ad nu s…ô-ƒßun- ¶u-ji a nakamuan, nika mar~…æar~…æid ni pi-d…ô.t…ô î~ °-ka-j…ô-ƒßu, ¶ia-…ô-kaj, n…ô- ¶…ôa-j…ô-ƒßu tu sakar~…æ…ô ¶an nu kawawan. atu masasu≈ãaaj atu min ¶ua a tad…ômaw.
S.FORM: == Fuo-la-di-mi-e. Lei-ngiÂºóÊãâËø™Á±≥Áàæ¬∑ÂàóÂØß == yikaudip yu mahidaÊó©ÊúüÁîüÊ¥ª wawa henayÂπ¥Â∞ëÊôÇÊúü Yi-li-ya.W-li-yen-nuo-fu atu ci Ma-li-ya.W-li-yeng-nuo-wa mikikun, lalabuay nu luma' a tademaw ci An-na. Yei-li-ca-nuo-wa, Ya-li-san-ta. W-li-yeng, Nuo-fu, Lea-nin, Aw-li-cia. W-li-yeng-nuo-wa, De-mi-te'-li. W-li-yeng-nuo-fu atu ci Ma-li-ya. W-li-yeng-nuo-wa. . Lea-nin a wama ci Yi-li-ya.W-li-yen-nuo-fu pilecuhan i E'-luo-se kalung nu malukay a lumaan, nai' ku wantan tu binacadan nida, hakiya idaw ku E'-luo-se tademaw, Cu-wa-se tademaw, Muo-e-duo-wa tademaw atu Ka-mai-ke' tademaw a nikalamel nu idangan, amica ku sasabay kawawan, itida ci nida i Ke'-san tabakiay a cacudadan minanam tu Wu-li atu Su-sye, sa taydan i Pen-sa siidaay nu cacudadan malasaydan, sisa tapabaw ku nikaudip. teban nu caywal nemlu mihcaan, Yi-li-ya atu ci Ma-li-ya. W-li-yeng-nuo-wa mikikung. 75 100 wama ni Ma-li-ya u kilisetu nu sinziaan a E'-luo-se-yu-tay-zen misaydan, wina u De-kuo atu Zui-dan nika lamella, u siidaay nu lumaan, nu micudaday ci nida. caay ka tenes namikikun, ci Yi-li-ya mala Sia-nuo-fu-ke-luo-de nu wawaan a cacudadan malacuzen, itida i Sin-pi-e-se mikuli makaala tu enemay a mihcan, tu sakalima a mihcaan, cinida sisa sihu aydaay nu pikiyakuan macaka malasen ci nu Kuo-li cacudadan nu dusye, pasikiningan tu sepat a lasubu lima a bataan nu kakuwanan a cicin. sakay pikiwyikuan idaw ku nipaayaw, sisa idaw ku kawlah nida tu Sen-fuo-la-di-mi-e nu payaan, pabelian tu sapidayday nu E-luo-se nu siidaay a tademaw. . Lea-nin a babalaki u cun-cu-cu-yi atu pakunida sananay a tademawan, pacukeday ci Sa-hun-ya-li-san-ta ese nipatahkalan a caywal nemcay mihcaan misumad tu kalung nu malukay. miliyas ku nuheni tu cen-ce a makatalay a tademaw, inai' ku siwmi ya kincal naw ku mikilim tu sapakasicumi tu nidatengan ni Lei-ngi mikantuk tu lumaan. mihcaan tu lalud, hamin nu luma' taydan i Lei-ni-nie-ke-ku'-e-ci-nuo midang, u calekakaan nida, ci Lei-ngi atu sabana nida ci Aw-li-cia masasungaay ku nu heni, icilang ku balucu, maaday aca, hina hang sa tu la'cusay nida a waywayan. manamuh miladlad tu udip, hatidaay tu nu demiadan manamuh i putah atu misalama tu tizibang. . caywal walnem mihcaan cacay a bulad, ci ama ni Lei-ngi siidang ku tangah sikapatay, tawya ci Lei-ngi mihcaan nida sabaw nem. kilul sa mahicaay tu kiya ku wayway ni Lei-ngi hina paculi tu, sisa amelik satu ci nida miales tu papatatengaan nida tu sinkuan. nanutawya, hida satu micudad tu Sen-pi-de-paw tabakiay a cacudadan tu Seng-wu-sye-si a kakaan nu Ya-li-san-ta, mibabelih tu Sa-hung-ya-li-san-ta sanse micidekay a cen-ce, malingatu taydan nu mikinkiw a kauyli nu misulitay a tademaw, atu masakaputay mibabelihay tu sihuan. caywal walpic mihcaan lima a bulad tusep dimiad, kaka ni Lei-ngi ci Ya-li-san-ta melacen mipatay. amica ku nikapatayan atu kaka u sakaadadaan nu balucuan, nika ci Lei-ngi pacicitu minanam, maala nida ku kawlah kapah ku nipihedek micuda. 118 420 mahida u kaka ci Ya-li-san-ta, ci Lei-ngi maala ni Ka-e.Ma-ke-se atu Fuo-zuy-de-li-si.N-ke-se a cudadan. caywal walpic walu a bulad, malingatu micudad tu Ke'-san tabakiay a cacudadan, ci Lei-ngi malimad taydan nida i tepal nu cacudadan. picudadan, milabu ci nida tu picidekan nu masakaputay a niyaduan, maala mala tabakiay nu cacudadan tu niyadu'ay a dayhuw. katukuh tu sabw tusa a bulad, maydah tu ku sihu tu masakaputay nu micudaday a mikuwan, mibabelih ci Lei-ngi, palekal tu sapipaculiyay nu kawawan. dakepen nu kingcal ci Lei-ngi, saan palekalay tina kawawan isu ki tapanga han. kilul sa paalesan nu cacudadan, nikudan patayda nu E'-luo-se-ti'-kuo ci Lei-ngi i nalumaan nu heni a Ke-ku'e-ci-nuo. itida ci nida mabilil micudad, manamuh miadih tu nisulitan ni Ni-ku-la.Ce-e-ni-sye-hu-se-ci a cudadan "hica han tu" . 124 mabiyalw cina ni Lei-ngi tu wayway nida, sakamuen nida ku E'-luo-se-ti'-kuo sakakaay papatalumaen ci Lei-ngi i Ke-sa, miyukiw tu sapicudad nu tabakiay a cacudadan mapabelineng. taluma' satu i Ke'-san, milabu ci Lei-ngi tu Ni-ku-la.Fai-du-sye-ye-hu tu nikasasakamuen, sisa sayaway nida misukapah ci Ka-e.Ma-ke'-se tu caywal nempic mihcaan ni sulitan a cudadan "ce-pen-lun". "Ë≥áÊú¨Ë´ñ". ci Lei-ngi malingatu micuda tu E'-luo-se ma-ke-cu-yi nisulitan ni Ke-aw-e-ci.Pu-lei-han-nuo-hu. palutatengan tu nisulitan ni Pu-lei-han-nuo-hu, nikudan palekal tu E'-luo-se fun-cin-ce-tu' milimad pasayda i ce-pen-cu-yu katukuh tu se-hun-cu-yi, ainai' ku zaysang atu macian nu mikuliay nu tademawan kiy taneng maadih, nika caay piida tu malukay. ci Lei-ngi amica ku nipikai tu sakalecad nu se-hun-cu-yi a nakamuan, nika malalid ni Pi-de.Te'-ka-ye-hu, Cia-e-kay, Ne-cea-ye-hu tu sakalecan nu kawawan. atu masasungaay atu mincua a tademaw.
S.PHON: == fuo-r~…æa-di-mi-…ô. r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi******** == jikaudip ju maƒßida**** wawa ƒß…ônaj**** ji-r~…æi-ja.w-r~…æi-j…ôn-nuo-fu atu ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja.w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa mikikun, r~…æar~…æabuaj nu r~…æuma î~ ° a tad…ômaw ¶i an-na. j…ôi-r~…æi- ¶a-nuo-wa, ja-r~…æi-san-ta. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã, nuo-fu, r~…æ…ôa-nin, aw-r~…æi- ¶ia. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa, d…ô-mi-t…ô î~ °-r~…æi. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-fu atu ¶i nida, ƒßakija idaw ku …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô tad…ômaw, ¶u-wa-s…ô tad…ômaw, muo-…ô-duo-wa tad…ômaw atu ka-mai-k…ô î~ ° tad…ômaw a nikar~…æam…ôr~…æ nu ida≈ãan, ami ¶a ku sasabaj kawawan, itida ¶i nida i k…ô î~ °-san tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu wu-r~…æi atu su-sj…ô, sa tajdan i p…ôn-sa siidaaj nu ¶a ¶udadan mar~…æasajdan, sisa tapabaw ku nikaudip. t…ôban nu ¶ajwar~…æ n…ômr~…æu miƒß ¶aan, ji-r~…æi-ja atu ¶i ma-r~…æi-ja. w-r~…æi-j…ô≈ã-nuo-wa mikiku≈ã. ** *** wama ni ma-r~…æi-ja u kir~…æis…ôtu nu sinziaan a …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô-ju-taj-z…ôn misajdan, wina u d…ô-kuo atu zui-dan nika r~…æam…ôr~…ær~…æa, u siidaaj nu r~…æumaan, nu mi ¶udadaj ¶i nida. ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs namikikun, ¶i ji-r~…æi-ja mar~…æa sia-nuo-fu-k…ô-r~…æuo-d…ô nu wawaan a ¶a ¶udadan mar~…æa ¶uz…ôn, itida i sin-pi-…ô-s…ô mikur~…æi makaar~…æa tu …ôn…ômaj a miƒß ¶an, tu sakar~…æima a miƒß ¶aan, ¶inida sisa siƒßu ajdaaj nu pikijakuan ma ¶aka mar~…æas…ôn ¶i nu kuo-r~…æi ¶a ¶udadan nu dusj…ô, pasikini≈ãan tu s…ôpat a r~…æasubu r~…æima a bataan nu kakuwanan a ¶i ¶in. sakaj pikiwjikuan idaw ku nipaajaw, sisa idaw ku kawr~…æaƒß nida tu s…ôn-fuo-r~…æa-di-mi-…ô nu pajaan, pab…ôr~…æian tu sapidajdaj nu …ô-r~…æuo-s…ô nu siidaaj a tad…ômaw. . r~…æ…ôa-nin a babar~…æaki u ¶un- ¶u- ¶u-ji atu pakunida sananaj a tad…ômawan, pa ¶uk…ôdaj ¶i sa-ƒßun-ja-r~…æi-san-ta …ôs…ô nipataƒßkar~…æan a ¶ajwar~…æ n…ôm ¶aj miƒß ¶aan misumad tu kar~…æu≈ã nu mar~…æukaj. mir~…æijas ku nuƒß…ôni tu ¶…ôn- ¶…ô a makatar~…æaj a tad…ômaw, inai î~ ° ku siwmi ja kin ¶ar~…æ naw ku mikir~…æim tu sapakasi ¶umi tu nidat…ô≈ãan ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi mikantuk tu r~…æumaan. miƒß ¶aan tu r~…æar~…æud, ƒßamin nu r~…æuma î~ ° tajdan i r~…æ…ôi-ni-ni…ô-k…ô-ku î~ °-…ô- ¶i-nuo mida≈ã, u ¶ar~…æ…ôkakaan nida, ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi atu sabana nida ¶i aw-r~…æi- ¶ia masasu≈ãaaj ku nu ƒß…ôni, i ¶ir~…æa≈ã ku bar~…æu ¶u, maadaj a ¶a, ƒßina ƒßa≈ã sa tu r~…æa î~ ° ¶usaj nida a wajwajan. manamuƒß mir~…æadr~…æad tu udip, ƒßatidaaj tu nu d…ômiadan manamuƒß i putaƒß atu misar~…æama tu tiziba≈ã. . ¶ajwar~…æ war~…æn…ôm miƒß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…æad, ¶i ama ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi siida≈ã ku ta≈ãaƒß sikapataj, tawja ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi miƒß ¶aan nida sabaw n…ôm. kir~…æur~…æ sa maƒßi ¶aaj tu kija ku wajwaj ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi ƒßina pa ¶ur~…æi tu, sisa am…ôr~…æik satu ¶i nida miar~…æ…ôs tu papatat…ô≈ãaan nida tu sinkuan. nanutawja, ƒßida satu mi ¶udad tu s…ôn-pi-d…ô-paw tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan tu s…ô≈ã-wu-sj…ô-si a kakaan nu ja-r~…æi-san-ta, mibab…ôr~…æiƒß tu sa-ƒßu≈ã-ja-r~…æi-san-ta sans…ô mi ¶id…ôkaj a ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, mar~…æi≈ãatu tajdan nu mikinkiw a kaujr~…æi nu misur~…æitaj a tad…ômaw, atu masakaputaj mibab…ôr~…æiƒßaj tu siƒßuan. ¶ajwar~…æ war~…æpi ¶ miƒß ¶aan r~…æima a bur~…æad tus…ôp dimiad, kaka ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi ¶i ja-r~…æi-san-ta m…ôr~…æa ¶…ôn mipataj. ami ¶a ku nikapatajan atu kaka u sakaadadaan nu bar~…æu ¶uan, nika ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi pa ¶i ¶itu minanam, maar~…æa nida ku kawr~…æaƒß kapaƒß ku nipiƒß…ôd…ôk mi ¶uda. *** *** maƒßida u kaka ¶i ja-r~…æi-san-ta, ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi maar~…æa ni ka-…ô.ma-k…ô-s…ô atu fuo-zuj-d…ô-r~…æi-si.n-k…ô-s…ô a ¶udadan. ¶ajwar~…æ war~…æpi ¶ war~…æu a bur~…æad, mar~…æi≈ãatu mi ¶udad tu k…ô î~ °-san tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan, ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi mar~…æimad tajdan nida i t…ôpar~…æ nu ¶a ¶udadan. pi ¶udadan, mir~…æabu ¶i nida tu pi ¶id…ôkan nu masakaputaj a nijaduan, maar~…æa mar~…æa tabakiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan tu nijadu î~ °aj a dajƒßuw. katukuƒß tu sabw tusa a bur~…æad, majdaƒß tu ku siƒßu tu masakaputaj nu mi ¶udadaj a mikuwan, mibab…ôr~…æiƒß ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi, par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu sapipa ¶ur~…æijaj nu kawawan. dak…ôp…ôn nu ki≈ã ¶ar~…æ ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi, saan par~…æ…ôkar~…æaj tina kawawan isu ki tapa≈ãa ƒßan. kir~…æur~…æ sa paar~…æ…ôsan nu ¶a ¶udadan, nikudan patajda nu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô-ti î~ °-kuo ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi i nar~…æumaan nu ƒß…ôni a k…ô-ku î~ °…ô- ¶i-nuo. itida ¶i nida mabir~…æir~…æ mi ¶udad, manamuƒß miadiƒß tu nisur~…æitan ni ni-ku-r~…æa. ¶…ô-…ô-ni-sj…ô-ƒßu-s…ô- ¶i a ¶udadan "ƒßi ¶a ƒßan tu" . *** mabijar~…æw ¶ina ni r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi tu wajwaj nida, sakamu…ôn nida ku …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô-ti î~ °-kuo sakakaaj papatar~…æuma…ôn ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi i k…ô-sa, mijukiw tu sapi ¶udad nu tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan mapab…ôr~…æin…ô≈ã. tar~…æuma î~ ° satu i k…ô î~ ¶…ô-p…ôn-r~…æun". "***". ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi mar~…æi≈ãatu mi ¶uda tu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô ma-k…ô- ¶u-ji nisur~…æitan ni k…ô-aw-…ô- ¶i.pu-r~…æ…ôi-ƒßan-nuo-ƒßu. par~…æutat…ô≈ãan tu nisur~…æitan ni pu-r~…æ…ôi-ƒßan-nuo-ƒßu, nikudan par~…æ…ôkar~…æ tu …ô î~ °-r~…æuo-s…ô fun- ¶in- ¶…ô-tu î~ ° mir~…æimad pasajda i ¶…ô-p…ôn- ¶u-ju katukuƒß tu s…ô-ƒßun- ¶u-ji, ainai î~ ° ku zajsa≈ã atu ma ¶ian nu mikur~…æiaj nu tad…ômawan kij tan…ô≈ã maadiƒß, nika ¶aaj piida tu mar~…æukaj. ¶i r~…æ…ôi-≈ãi ami ¶a ku nipikai tu sakar~…æ…ô ¶ad nu s…ô-ƒßun- ¶u-ji a nakamuan, nika mar~…æar~…æid ni pi-d…ô.t…ô î~ °-ka-j…ô-ƒßu, ¶ia-…ô-kaj, n…ô- ¶…ôa-j…ô-ƒßu tu sakar~…æ…ô ¶an nu kawawan. atu masasu≈ãaaj atu min ¶ua a tad…ômaw.
